creative_direction.reasoning: Editorial poster layout with a central line-art illustrated portrait (Rory McIlroy mid-celebration) that image-gen must generate in a specific style (New Yorker / FT editorial ink work). Typography is elaborate — includes terminal-style digital numbers ('6.6%') and a multi-line legal block. Track B recommended for typography accuracy; Track A can produce the illustration + canvas.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: News-cycle reactive editorial poster — cultural question as headline, illustrated golfer portrait, dollar-return asymmetry math at the bottom.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Full bake including headline, stat, illustration, payoff line, legal.

nano_banana_json.scene: Editorial poster on an off-white cream background. Top: small green Kalshi wordmark + tagline. Below: a two-line black ExtraBold sans headline posing a question. Below that: a smaller sans line with the word '6.6%' in a stylized terminal/digital font. Center: a stylized ink-and-flat-color line-art illustration of a golfer (Rory McIlroy style — red hair under white cap, floral print shirt, cream pants) mid-fist-pump walking the fairway. Bottom: a single black sans line stating the dollar return. Below that: multi-line tiny legal copy.

color_palette.role: golf club head / cap brim orange accent

vertical_zones: Top 4-8%: 'Kalshi' green ExtraBold + 'Trade what's next.' black regular on same horizontal line, top-left aligned
Top 10-22%: two-line ExtraBold black headline 'Will Rory McIlroy win / the major in Augusta?'
Middle-upper 23-28%: 'Traders are giving him a [6.6%] chance.' with '6.6%' in a stylized terminal/bracket-edge monospace font
Center 30-78%: ink-and-flat-color illustration of a golfer mid-fist-pump walking fairway, approximately 55% canvas height
Bottom 82-88%: single line 'Turn your $100 into $1,516 if he wins.' in black sans
Bottom 90-97%: multi-line tiny gray legal disclaimer

text_elements_in_image.font: Kalshi wordmark ExtraBold in green + regular sans in black

text_elements_in_image.content:
Will Rory McIlroy win
the major in Augusta?
Traders are giving him a 6.6% chance.
text_elements_in_image.font: Sans Regular + stylized terminal/bracket monospace for '6.6%'
text_elements_in_image.stylization_note: the '6.6%' characters have bracket-edged terminal-display letterforms (reference: Bloomberg terminal, vintage digital scoreboard)

text_elements_in_image.content: Turn your $100 into $1,516 if he wins.

Restrictions and eligibility requirements apply. Event contract trading involves significant risk and is not appropriate for everyone. Please carefully consider if it's appropriate for you in light of your personal financial circumstances. Prices may not be live and are subject to change. See kalshi.com/regulatory for more information. Federally regulated event contract exchange. Users over the age of 18 are able to register and trade.

illustration_spec.style: Editorial line-art with flat color fills, reminiscent of New Yorker magazine illustrations or vintage sports zine — NOT photorealistic, NOT 3D, NOT a cartoon
illustration_spec.subject: Male golfer walking forward toward camera on a fairway, mid-stride, right arm bent in triumphant fist-pump, left hand holding a golf club by the grip at his side (club head visible near the ground with an orange accent cap)
illustration_spec.wardrobe: white/cream ballcap with orange brim accent; short-sleeve floral-print button-down shirt with muted multi-color pattern (cream background, small navy + orange + dusty-blue abstract florals); cream/tan chinos or pants; white golf shoes
illustration_spec.hair_and_skin: red-brown (#8B4513) curly hair under cap; pale skin with subtle red flush
illustration_spec.pose_note: facing camera, body angled slightly left, right foot mid-stride forward
illustration_spec.rendering: crisp black ink outlines (~2px), minimal shading, flat color blocks, no rendered depth or 3D shadow

negative_prompt: no tournament logos or sponsor branding

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate cream canvas + golfer illustration only. All typography overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Warm cream (#F3F0E9) canvas at 5:6 aspect (1080x1296). Center 30-78% of canvas contains an editorial line-art and flat-color illustration of a male golfer — see illustration_spec in Track A. Rest of canvas is empty cream space reserved for overlaid text and brand mark.
negative_prompt: no legal copy — all reserved zones must be empty cream space

assets.name: Kalshi wordmark
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: 'Kalshi' in editorial ExtraBold sans-serif, saturated forest green (#2E9E6B).

assets.name: Editorial golfer illustration
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: See illustration_spec — New Yorker / FT editorial ink-and-flat-color style. Critical: NOT photorealistic.
assets.fallback_composite_source: custom illustration commission / stock editorial library
assets.fidelity_confidence: medium — style is distinctive, iterate on 'editorial ink illustration' keyword

prompt_writer_training_notes: Illustration style description is the MOST important variable — 'editorial line-art with flat color fills, reminiscent of New Yorker magazine illustrations' performs much better than 'illustrated golfer'. Avoid the word 'cartoon' or 'realistic' — both wrong register. Terminal-style '6.6%' is the single micro-flourish that signals finance literacy — if image-gen can't do it, composite that substring separately with a terminal font. The 5:6 aspect ratio is intentional for editorial feel vs 1:1. Legal copy is long — plan for at least 5 lines of tiny gray sans.
